title: Glowing Glassy Argentinian Candy Hash
description: A festive paleo-friendly dessert featuring white chocolate chips and colorful candy, cast in a glassy resinous jelly.
instructions: Melt the coconut sugar and coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the white chocolate chips until melted.
Add the coconut oil, vanilla extract, and lime juice, stirring until combined.
Pour the mixture into a cast-iron skillet and top with crushed candy.
Place the skillet in the freezer for 30 minutes to set.
Remove from the freezer and break into pieces.
Optional: melt the candy melts and use as a drizzle or sprinkle on top of the hash.
